Root biomass was collected and weighed from soil cores at each plot, then scaled to an area estimate. Leaf biomass was weighed separately for each individual in a plot, and the sum of leaf biomass at each plot then determined an area estimate. These two measures then determined root:leaf ratio at each plot.
